modes.scenario_simulation: If moisture-service loss is X, what is the risk/value distribution?
modes.concurrent_hindcast: Given observed historical rainfall, does the engine recover observed yield sign/rank?
modes.descriptive_monitoring: What is the observed current/recent condition of the source forest?
modes.forecast_research: Can a lead-time rainfall forecast improve loss estimates? (behind Gate F)
modes.true_forecasting: Given pre-season information, what loss is likely in the future?

claims.statement: Scenario simulation is live for the validated corridor.
claims.reason: run_pipeline() runs S1-S5 as a Monte Carlo over parameter priors; an if-then valuation, not a probability over futures.
claims.caveat: low/central/high f_loss are NAMED STRESSES, not calibrated probabilities; do not pool them as an interval.

claims.reason: Gate 2 uses same-year CHIRPS rainfall to predict detrended IBGE yield anomalies; PASS for sign/rank (held-out 2024 r=+0.45; pooled r=+0.21, cluster-robust p~0.004 over ~22 event-years).
claims.caveat: Sign/rank only, NOT severe-drought magnitude; this is CONCURRENT validation, not forecast skill. The 2021/22 financial backtest is an OBSERVED actual-vs-trend counterfactual, not an engine prediction.

claims.reason: The ET/forest-loss monitor is partly corroborated (sign-strong, correlation-weak).
claims.caveat: DESCRIPTIVE only and firewalled from price: it cannot modify f_loss, w_soybelt, A_source_ha, the USD/ha, or VaR. Not an early-warning or price/harvest forecast.

claims.reason: portfolio_var() computes VaR/ES over parameter priors.
claims.caveat: EPISTEMIC parameter-uncertainty only (credible interval on EXPECTED annual loss); must carry var_basis; NOT a year-to-year aleatory tail; aleatory variability is Phase 2.

claims.statement: Avoided-loss USD/ha may be reported as a scenario range.
claims.reason: S5 inverts total downwind loss to a 30-yr NPV per ha; area-invariant at fixed w.
claims.caveat: Reported as a RANGE (f_loss not backtested); a 30-yr NPV LOWER BOUND (water + one crop + one sink). Compare like-for-like: NPV vs land price ($295/ha), annual-flow vs Baker ($59.40/ha/yr) - never NPV vs an annual figure.

claims.reason: No lead-time skill has passed any gate; current validation is concurrent, not predictive.
Resilience / condition signals are descriptive and lagging, never a forecast.
ET/condition anomalies are descriptive and partly corroborated, not validated service-loss drivers; coupling them to price is unvalidated and forbidden.
s_uk is a low-confidence placeholder; the UK VaR is indicative until real trade/exposure data lands.
Outputs are indicative, not prudential-grade; coverage is a FLOOR (>=1-2a), never a calibrated 95 percent; effective n ~ event-years.

_note: Machine-readable claim permissions. true_forecasting is NOT allowed until Gate F passes; forecast/early-warning phrases are liftable only behind Gate F. The general diligence landmines (trademark, regulatory-treatment, calibrated-coverage) are enforced by the project commit guard, not this registry.
